# Identity Providers

## Preferred
### Keycloak
- open source
- supports OIDC, OAuth 2.0, and SAML
- avoids immediate vendor lock-in
- preferred default for enterprise applications

## Alternative
### Microsoft Entra ID
Use when Microsoft ecosystem integration or support requirements are the primary drivers.

## Clarification
This document compares identity provider products. For protocol and session guidance, see:
- `docs/enterprise/domains/security/application-authentication-standard.md`
- `docs/enterprise/patterns/session-and-token-patterns.md`
